page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance consistently in the average tier across most standard workloads. It achieves a Geekbench multi-core score of 13384.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 35326.14. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only large block bandwidth of 141.73 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 65.94 GB/sec. Notably, the instance demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small 135M language models, reaching 282.15 tokens/sec, while maintaining average speeds for larger 7B models.

Lacking local NVMe SSDs and dedicated GPUs, the ecs.r7.8xlarge trades off high-speed local storage and hardware-accelerated graphics for a dense, dedicated memory profile. This configuration is highly cost-efficient for memory-bound enterprise applications that do not require GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for database operations, Redis caching, software compilation, and medium-scale text processing or inference tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, offering a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, but contains no local storage or GPUs. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate solid, average-tier performance across multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations, with a notable strength in text generation for small language models. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, database hosting, Redis caching, and software compilation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for databases and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated x86 memory-optimized instance featuring high RAM density and balanced multi-core performance for enterprise databases and caching.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
256 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Strong text generation performance for small language models
Optimized for databases, Redis caching, and memory-intensive workloads
